name: Alzinova AB
summary: Alzinova AB, a biopharma company, engages in the development of an active immunotherapy for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease in Sweden. Its lead candidate is ALZ-101, an oligomer-specific vaccine for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease; and ALZ-201, a monoclonal antibody that is used for the treatment of toxic A√É¬ü oligomers. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in M√É¬∂lndal, Sweden.
